case_title: LISA HABIB VS. PUSH MODELS, LLC AN ARIZONA LIMITED LIABILITY COMP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HABIB, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT PUSH MODELS, LLC AN ARIZONA LIMITED LIABILITY COMP PUSH MODELS, LLC, AN ARIZONA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SACKS, JONATHAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
